### Type of Change

- [ ] ✨ New feature

### Compliance Checklist
- [ ] No PHI in code, comments, or test data
- [ ] All new endpoints have authentication
- [ ] Audit logging added for new operations
- [ ] Guardrail checks pass for new features
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or API keys

### Testing
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest medi_comply/tests/ -v`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Adversarial tests pass
- [ ] Guardrail penetration tests pass

### Documentation
- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] API docs auto-generated (Swagger)
- [ ] Docstrings added to new functions
